unit.title: Location And Everyday Movement
unit.communicationGoal: Ask where something is, say where you are going, understand a simple destination or transport exchange, and complete a short route dialogue.
pronunciationFocus: The directional suffixes -га / -ка blend smoothly onto place names: Базарга sounds like one word
Кайда has stress on the second syllable: kay-DA
Keep the final т in барат clearly voiced but short
